nasb.text: They also had a few small fish; and after He had blessed them, He ordered these to be served as well.

esv.text: And they had a few small fish. And having blessed them, he said that these also should be set before them.

cnv.text: 他們還有幾條小魚，耶穌祝了福，就吩咐把這些也擺開。

ccb.text: 他们还有几条小鱼。耶稣祝谢了，叫门徒分给众人。

csbs.text: 他们还有几条小鱼，耶稣祝福了，就吩咐把它们也分给众人。
